common.selfHosted: Self-hosted. No vendor lock-in. Your data stays yours.

landing.heroDescription: Vajra automates member tracking, UPI payments, and check-ins — so you can focus on running your gym, not chasing renewals.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your gym needs. Nothing it doesn't.
landing.featuresDescription: No bloated features, no monthly payment-gateway fees. Vajra is built for Indian gym owners who want a fast, simple tool that works on any device.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to run your gym smarter?
landing.ctaDescription: Set up takes under 5 minutes. No credit card required.
landing.featureUpiDesc: Generate direct UPI payment links. No payment gateway fees, no middlemen — money goes straight to your account.
landing.featureWhatsappDesc: Send renewal reminders via WhatsApp with one tap. No SMS costs, no third-party integrations needed.
landing.featureKioskDesc: Members punch in a 4-digit PIN on a full-screen kiosk. No hardware required — just a cheap Android tablet.
landing.featureRbacDesc: Owners see revenue. Receptionists handle check-ins. Trainers see their members. Everyone gets exactly what they need.
landing.featureExpiryDesc: Memberships are automatically marked expired. No more manual tracking or spreadsheet nightmares.
landing.featureMultiBranchDesc: Manage multiple gym locations from a single dashboard. Each branch tracks its own members and revenue.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your Vajra account
auth.signUpSuccess: Account created! Please verify your email.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a 6-digit code to your email address. Enter it below to verify your account.
verifyEmail.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email!

acceptInvite.title: Accept Invitation
acceptInvite.description: Enter the email address your invitation was sent to, and the 6-digit verification code from the email.
acceptInvite.emailTooltip: The email address your invitation was sent to
acceptInvite.successDescription: Your invitation has been accepted. Redirecting…
acceptInvite.inviteAccepted: Invitation accepted! Redirecting to your workspace…

onboarding.step0Description: This is what your staff and members will see.
onboarding.gymNameTooltip: This is what your staff and members will see
onboarding.step1Description: Members pay directly to your UPI ID. No middlemen, zero fees.
onboarding.upiIdTooltip: Your UPI ID for receiving member payments
onboarding.upiAppsNote: Works with {phonePe}, {googlePay}, {paytm}, and all UPI apps.
onboarding.step2Description: You can always add more plans later from Settings.
onboarding.planNameTooltip: The name members see when enrolling
onboarding.durationNote: Duration is set to {days} days by default.

workspaces.title: Your Gyms
workspaces.noWorkspaces: You don't belong to any workspace yet.
workspaces.completeOnboarding: Complete onboarding to create your first gym.

members.title: Members
members.expiringBanner: {count} member{count, plural, one {} other {s}} expiring within 7 days
members.trialBanner: {count} trial member{count, plural, one {} other {s}} — follow up to convert
members.enquiryBanner: {count} enquir{count, plural, one {y} other {ies}} — reach out before they churn
members.newBanner: {count} new member{count, plural, one {} other {s}} joined in the last 7 days
members.profileDescription: Private details — visible only to staff in this view.
members.sharePinNote: Share this PIN with the member for self check-in at the kiosk.

addMember.title: New Member
addMember.description: Enter member details and select a plan.
addMember.name: Name
addMember.nameTooltip: Member's full name as shown in records
addMember.phoneTooltip: 10-digit Indian mobile number for WhatsApp reminders
addMember.emailTooltip: Used for email notifications if configured
addMember.kioskPinConstraint: Exactly 4 digits. Leave blank to auto-generate.
addMember.planTooltip: Membership plan determines price and duration
addMember.scanQr: Scan the QR or use the UPI link to collect ₹{amount}
addMember.paymentRecorded: Payment recorded! Member is now ACTIVE.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Invite, manage, and track staff
employees.inviteDialogDescription: Send an email invitation with a verification code. The employee must sign up and enter the code to join.
employees.noEmployeesDescription: Invite your first employee to start managing your gym staff.
employees.editDialogDescription: Update employee details. Changes take effect immediately.

inviteForm.name: Full Name
inviteForm.nameTooltip: Employee's display name across the platform
inviteForm.emailTooltip: Used for login and receiving the invitation code
inviteForm.phoneTooltip: Internal contact number. Not shared with members.
inviteForm.roleTooltip: Manager: full ops access. Trainer: floor access. Receptionist: front-desk only.
inviteForm.branchesTooltip: Employee can only switch to and view data from these branches

employees.confirmRemove: Remove {name}? They will lose access to this gym.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noRevenueData: No revenue data yet. Complete transactions to see trends here.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.filterPlaceholder: Filter by action or entity type…

branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Manage your gym locations
branches.createDialogDescription: Add a new gym location. Coordinates enable geolocation-based staff attendance.
branches.editDialogDescription: Update branch details. Coordinate changes affect geolocation-based attendance.
branches.noBranchesDescription: Create your first branch to manage multiple gym locations.
branches.branchNameTooltip: Unique name for this gym location
branches.contactPhoneTooltip: Public phone number for this branch
branches.gpsHelp: Open Google Maps → right-click your gym → copy the Lat/Lng values.

plans.title: Membership Plans
plans.subtitle: Manage pricing plans for your gym
plans.createDialogDescription: Define a new pricing plan for your gym.
plans.editDialogDescription: Update the plan details. Changes apply to new enrollments only.
plans.noPlans: No plans yet. Create your first plan to start enrolling members.
plans.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what's included in this plan…
plans.descriptionTooltip: Optional details shown on the plan card. Supports Markdown.
plans.durationTooltip: How long the membership lasts after activation
plans.branchTooltip: Assign to a specific branch or make available everywhere

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your gym's payment, kiosk, and notification preferences.
settings.paymentDescription: UPI handle and payment QR code configuration
settings.upiHandleTooltip: Your UPI ID used for generating payment QR codes and deep links for members
settings.upiHandleConstraint: Works with PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, and all UPI apps.
settings.upiQrTooltip: Custom QR code image shown to members during payment. When removed, an auto-generated QR is used.
settings.upiQrRemoved: UPI QR code removed. Auto-generated QR will be used.
settings.imageTooLarge: Image too large. Maximum size is 500 KB.
settings.checkoutTooltip: When enabled, a member entering their PIN a second time records a check-out
settings.checkoutEnabled: Members can check out by entering their PIN again.
settings.checkoutDisabled: Only check-ins are recorded. Check-out is off.
settings.whatsappTooltip: Customize the renewal reminder message sent to members via WhatsApp
settings.whatsappConstraint: Max 1,000 characters. Leave empty to use the default template.
settings.whatsappPlaceholders:
Available placeholders:
• {name} — Member's name
• {gym} — Your gym name
• {amount} — Plan price (₹)
• {upiLink} — UPI payment link

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your account details.
profile.emailTooltip: Your login email. Cannot be changed.
profile.fullNameTooltip: Your display name across the platform
profile.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.

kiosk.noBranchDescription: Create a branch first before using kiosk mode.
kiosk.checkedOut: Checked out — see you next time!

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified. Please try again or return to the dashboard.
errors.criticalError: A critical error occurred. Please try refreshing the page or return to the dashboard.
